Premium Grocery Receipts Settlement: Itemized Receipts Required

A class action settlement has been reached over allegedly inflated prices on premium grocery items. Class members who can show qualifying purchases between 2019 and 2024 may file for reimbursement.

  • Claim Form Deadline: 06/30/2027
  • Estimated Payout: up to $250 per household
  • Proof of Purchase: Itemized receipts required to claim higher payouts.
  • Settlement Administrator: Premium Grocery Settlement Admin
  • Case Number: 23-cv-99887
  • Class Members: anyone who purchased premium-tier groceries 2019-2024

You must submit a photograph of the receipt with your claim form to receive the higher payout tier.
